case_title: MICHAEL P BYOD VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOYD, MICHAEL P AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOYD, MICHAEL P RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $14,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $84.38 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,384.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
